title: JavaScript Math Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of rounding, min/max, and random number generation in JavaScript.

questions.question: Which of the following Math methods rounds a number to its NEAREST integer?
What does Math.random() return?
options: A floating-point pseudo-random number in the range [0, 1).

questions.question: How do you calculate the square root of 64 using the Math object?
What is the return value of Math.max(-5, -1, -10)?
Is Math a constructor (can you call 'new Math()')?
options: Yes, like every other object in JavaScript.
No, it is a built-in static object only.
Yes, but only in ES6 or later.
No, it's an interface and cannot be instantiated.
